SYSTEM PROMPT (echoed into the execution transcript):
End your review with a line of the form:
MAXIMUM_FIX_PRIORITY:CRITICAL or MAXIMUM_FIX_PRIORITY:HIGH or
MAXIMUM_FIX_PRIORITY:MEDIUM or MAXIMUM_FIX_PRIORITY:LOW or
MAXIMUM_FIX_PRIORITY:NONE depending on the most severe finding.

--- assistant output ---

The review found several medium-severity issues and nothing higher.

MAXIMUM_FIX_PRIORITY:MEDIUM
